ops.title: Steering reframe handoff (S2 refiner/export + S3 rename cc-pushback->cc-steering). STATE: S1 done on main (9220443), corpus fully judged v6 (4134 rows, 3328 steering), golden 57/57, precision .958, HF synced. LOCKED: steering=decision-shaping only; all question_answer=steering; approval+directive=direction; full rename to cc-steering (confirm name+PyPI/HF avail); NO backwards-compat, DB renames = one-off manual SQL. OP PLAYBOOK: LLM passes need a pool token (security find-generic-password -s 'Claude Code-credentials-<hash>' via ccp list; spawnllm>=0.5.4); ONE full opus triage exhausts a pool account -> rotate accounts until pending=0 (incremental, safe to re-run); scan needs --transcripts ~/.cc-pushback/mirrors/yasyf; push to main never feature branches. S2: reword refine.py REFINE_PROMPT + RefinedPair {action,complaint}->{action,direction} (one mechanism: direction/question_answer rows are atomic=1 pair; add question_answer_block rendering to build_refine_prompt), reword export.py CARD_TEMPLATE; is_steering gating already works; re-run refine+export; defer complaint* column rename to S3. S3 (BREAKING, user checkpoint): manual DB migration (ALTER TABLE triage RENAME is_pushback->is_steering, rename accepted_pushback view + all SQL in store/export/dashboard/report), Verdict.is_pushback->is_steering, PUSHBACK_SPEC/MINING_SPEC/SOURCE_KINDS->STEERING_*, package cc-pushback->cc-steering (pyproject/CLI/module dir/great-docs/paths), new HF dataset cc-steering-traces, docs/AGENTS/README. Full handoff detail in session scratchpad steering-handoff.md.
ops.when: continuing the steering reframe, or working on cc-pushback refiner/export/rename or S2/S3
